reviews.review_description: This game needs a update doing the tack mechanics is broken The zombies were creatures or walk up to me and just be chewing on something in the air and not physically chewing on me and I got down the side it's not giving a real mechanic up I'm actually getting chewed on it but they chewed on some in mid-air and sometimes it will affect me and sometimes it don't Even if they not buy me or close enough they just get to a certain point where you at and alternate just start chewing on you in the air that's a bad it breaks the motion The graphics are good but the tack mechanic is very bad I'm kind of kills the game when you going to take by a zombie that's not physically actually biting on you and just buying out in the air and they detecting you now I can get so close to you and they stop at a certain point and they start attacking me in the air chewed on some in the air where they mainly about to be chewing on you but they chewing off in the air you can just almost just stand there and watch it while killing them please update this please That's a game breaker I was excited when I first got it but then once I just saw seeing the flaws in the game it was kind of ruined it and I know you can't move nowhere you got a physically move but it doesn't scan your environment where you can actually move around while running into something to make it more funner if it's modded to your environment you can walk around and shoot the zombies while running about running into your couch or your table or something cuz you can't move with no joystick you can physically move but it doesn't work when you don't know if you going to run into something or not unless you fix it where it mall to your environment to where you can physically walk around if you play a game you wouldn't know what I'm talking about when you getting attacked it's a cool concept game but bad mechanics when it comes it again take by zombies or the creature it kind of kills the game
